title: Arrays, Pointers, Arithmetic, and Bounds · Object-Lifetime Lens: Pointer Arithmetic Domain
summary: A raster pipeline slices rows and subviews while changed dimensions expose one-past, negative-offset, and lost-bound defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem pointer arithmetic domain increment in bounded image-slice library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Perform pointer arithmetic only within one array object or one-past it and avoid dereferencing one-past pointers.
Preserve array extent where possible and predict array-to-pointer conversion at expressions and parameters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Pointer Arithmetic Domain · Theory Pointer Arithmetic Domain
steps.instruction:
